## Summary
Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Reproducibility/tooling update
- [ ] Experiment/script update
- [ ] Other

## Reproducibility
- [ ] I included exact commands to reproduce the result.
- [ ] I included expected output or acceptance criteria.

## Claim Discipline
- [ ] Mechanism-level claims are separated from external-validity claims.
- [ ] Limitations are stated when relevant.

## Checklist
- [ ] I linked related issue(s).
- [ ] I kept scope focused.
- [ ] I did not modify immutable historical records without explicit maintainer approval.
